creator: wulf@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Johnston from comment #17)
libinput has changed clickpad detection mechanism several hours ago:
https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/libinput/libinput/-/commit/fbe5d35dca88ae9a751623cbfa3b6ed2f012ec83

For now the touchpad should work out of box and only produce a warnings in Xorg log.
